114.reason: [The program cannot distinguish between the end of the first polynomial and the start of the second because both loops read until EOF. The input consists of two lines, but scanf with %d skips whitespace including newlines, so the first loop consumes all input, leaving nothing for the second loop. This causes poly2 to be empty, leading to incorrect multiplication result.]
